trades.reasoning: Perfect momentum score with all 5 bullish signals confirmed — RSI 69.2 in the sweet spot, MACD crossover and rising histogram, price 9% above SMA-20 with volume surge — semiconductor equipment names are riding the AI chip buildout wave.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ +0.9% and S&P +0.8% confirming broad market strength. Cash sits just under the $500 threshold at $477 but 4 slots remain open, so deploying remaining cash into ACMR — a semiconductor equipment name with a perfect momentum score and every technical indicator aligned bullish. Existing positions across consumer, display tech, AI services, and construction continue to benefit from the rally.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly on Thursday as the risk-on tone was reinforced by continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and resilient economic data. The NASDAQ outpaced the S&P 500, with semiconductor and tech equipment names leading the charge as investors rotated back into high-growth sectors. Improving breadth across industrials and consumer discretionary further supported the move, suggesting the rally has legs beyond just mega-cap AI plays.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週四全面上漲，風險偏好情緒升溫，投資人持續看好人工智慧基礎建設支出前景及韌性十足的經濟數據。那斯達克指數漲幅領先標普500，半導體及科技設備類股成為最大贏家，資金積極回流高成長板塊。工業及非必需消費品類股同步走強，顯示此波漲勢已不僅局限於大型AI龍頭，市場廣度正在擴大。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy where you buy stocks that have been trending upward — using signals like RSI, MACD crossovers, and price above moving averages to confirm that buyers are in control. The idea is that stocks in motion tend to stay in motion, at least in the short term. Today's top candidates (score 100) all showed this pattern: rising price, expanding volume, and MACD confirming the uptrend.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，並藉由RSI、MACD黃金交叉及股價站上移動平均線等技術指標，確認市場由買方主導。其核心邏輯是「強者恆強」——短期內，上漲趨勢確立的股票往往會繼續上漲。今日評分滿分（100分）的候選股均符合此特徵：股價上揚、成交量放大、MACD指標同步確認多頭趨勢。
